Metadata.title: Lassenware — We make your life easier
Metadata.description: Digital solutions for your business. Landing pages, e-commerce and custom systems. Founded by Lisandro Andia, Mendoza.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Solution
ecommerce.description: A complete e-commerce web application featuring MercadoPago integration and Tiendanube platform.

lostilos.title: Club Management System
lostilos.description: Platform to manage partners with authentication, categorization, and activity tracking.

hexagon.title: Hexagon Solutions Web
hexagon.description: Corporate website development focused on modern design principles and high performance.

estudioandia.title: Estudio Andia Web
estudioandia.description: Elegant static website for an architecture studio, built for speed and visual impact.

ando-presskit.title: Ando Press Kit
ando-presskit.description: Interactive electronic press kit for a Progressive House DJ group from Mendoza, Argentina.

master-event.title: Master Event Web
master-event.description: Website for a sound equipment rental company in Mendoza, Argentina.

Process.title: How do we work?
Process.subtitle: A simple process designed for extraordinary results.

idea.title: Share your idea
idea.description: Tell us what you need to solve or what project you have in mind.

meeting.title: Discovery Meeting
meeting.description: A brief meeting to dive deeper into your goals and requirements.

proposal.title: Custom proposal
proposal.description: We present a detailed plan, budget, and delivery timeline.

About.title: The story behind Lassenware
About.body: "Lassen" is the nickname that comes from Lisandro. When I started taking on my own projects, I wanted the company to carry my identity — not a generic name, but something that reflects the person behind the work. Lassenware is me and the results I deliver.

Contact.title: Let's talk?
Contact.subtitle: We're ready to take your project to the next level.
